Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Plaintiff in Pro Per Shufen Su (415)752-2763/ Atty. Warren Woo (415)752-4608 appearing for defendant Julia Yueh/ Atty. John Boessenecker (415)392-3374 appearing for Other and moving party Amy Harrington/ Atty. Thomas Drohan (415)538-333 representing cross-complaintants.

The Court, having reviewed the briefs submitted, and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: OTHER AMY HARRINGTON (REFEREE)'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Agreement Of The Parties; For Payment Of Referee's Fees; For Payment Of Of Referee's Attorney Fees is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order.

In open court, John Boessenecker, Esq. conducts the auction for real property located at 250-252 27th Ave., San Francisco, California. The highest bidder is Henry Ho represented by brocker Christopher Burnley for $1,680,000.00. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Papers due by Monday, April 21, 2014.
